name: socialforge
description: Open-source agency-grade social media production engine — calendar parsing, asset-first compositing (brand assets are sacred, AI is the creative layer around them), AI image generation (Vertex AI Nano Banana Pro), AI video generation (WaveSpeed Kling v3.0 Pro), multi-platform copy adaptation (Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Threads, X, Facebook, YouTube Shorts), human-in-the-loop review galleries, and C2PA content provenance signing for EU AI Act Article 50 compliance (applicable 2 Aug 2026). **16 skills, 25 commands, 5 agents, 22 scripts, 10 HTTP MCP connectors, 0 global hooks.** Four creative modes (ANCHOR_COMPOSE / ENHANCE_EXTEND / STYLE_REFERENCED / PURE_CREATIVE). Installs on **5 coding-agent surfaces**: Claude Code + Cowork (canonical), OpenAI Codex, Cursor, GitHub Copilot CLI (auto-discovers .claude-plugin/plugin.json), Google Antigravity 2.0 (experimental). Single skills/ directory shared across all platforms. **v1.8.1** adds Star History, community-standards files (CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, SECURITY.md, PR + Issue templates), and rewrites the README with social-proof badges + maintainer block (linkedin.com/in/askneelnow + x.com/askneelnow); fixes stale asset counts (15→16 skills, 19→22 scripts). **v1.8.0** added Copilot CLI + experimental Antigravity install surfaces. **v1.7.0** added Codex + Cursor manifests. **v1.6.0** added end-to-end-tested C2PA content provenance signing (75-byte test PNG → ~43 KB signed PNG with manifest_embedded_and_verified=true). May 2026 channel pack: TikTok USDS post-Jan 2026, LinkedIn March 2026 algorithm + Depth Score, Apple MPP, YouTube AI labeling, Sora deprecation → defaults to Runway Gen-4 / Veo 3.x / Kling 3.0. All 10 HTTP MCP connectors are Cowork-compatible. MIT-licensed, free, no telemetry. Built and maintained by Indranil Banerjee (https://indranil.in). Part of the Neelverse Marketing Suite alongside Digital Marketing Pro and ContentForge. Shared model curator (scripts/model_registry.json + resolve_model.py): image / video / vision model ids resolved via aliases (latest-image-google, latest-image-edit-google, latest-vision-google, latest-video-wavespeed, latest-video-google); deprecated ids auto-fall-forward; --model and --video-model flags accept any registered id. See docs/MODEL-CURATOR.md.
